title: Identity Layer for Agents and Autonomous AI
abstract: Identity Layer is a robust framework that enables secure and seamless identity management for various agents and AI systems, ensuring trustworthiness in interactions.
abstract_zh: 嘿朋友，你知道吗？Identity Layer就是那个能让你和各种各样的机器人、AI系统都能安全又无缝地打交道的保险箱，保证每次交流都靠谱不掉链子。绝对是你跟这些AI小伙伴建立信任关系的秘密武器！
